guidelines: Keep the form minimal: only essential fields
Provide clear error feedback inline with each field
Include social login options if applicable
Show password visibility toggle and strength indicator
colorGuidance: Clean white or light form panel
Brand colors on the secondary panel or background
Error states in red, success in green
spacingGuidance: 32px gap between field group and submit button
commonMistakes: Too many fields on the initial sign-up form
Forgot password link hard to find
No indication of password requirements before submission
qualityChecklist: Tab order is logical through all form fields
Error messages are specific and actionable
Submit button is clearly the primary action
